training_status: Active in sports (skateboarding, basketball, martial arts); regular gym training

compounds.frequency: daily, 5 days on 2 days off, at 10pm before bed
nightly 5 days on 2 days off (Sun-Thu), 3 hours before sleep; loaded at 100mcg/night for first 2 weeks

benefits.description: Chronic neck, shoulder, and knee pain significantly reduced; felt like 17 again in terms of knee pain
Eradicated most workout-related pains, allowed training harder and more effectively
30lb gain in muscle mass with minimal fat during bulking phase on CJC/IPA stack
DSIP significantly improved sleep quality; woke up feeling refreshed and rested
Slight subjective improvements in aggression from Kisspeptin
Dropped 25lbs in 2 months using Tirzepatide during cut cycle, hit goal weight

side_effects.description: CJC/IPA significantly increased appetite, making balanced diet challenging
Multiple daily injections caused visible bruising and small dots on stomach area

protocol_notes: Used pre-blended BPC/TB and CJC/IPA vials for cost and convenience. Pinned different peptides at different times: CJC/IPA first thing in the morning fasted, DSIP at 7pm, BPC/TB & Kisspeptin at 10pm before bed. DSIP load phase: 100mcg/night for 2 weeks, then dropped to 50mcg. Cut cycle planned for March-May with Tirzepatide then AOD9604. Supplements included vitamin D, C, B12, elderberries, fish oil, pre-workout with creatine. Ordered from Peptide Sciences. Documented full protocol in Google Docs including BAC water reconstitution, dosing, timing, and pricing.
